characters.appearance: South Asian female, 20s-30s, medium build, light brown complexion. She has expressive dark eyes and a warm smile. Her facial features occasionally shift slightly due to AI generation.
characters.wardrobe: In the top panel, she wears a black abaya and a patterned grey and black hijab. In the bottom panel flashbacks, she wears various modest outfits, frequently a light beige or pink hijab with simple tunics.
characters.demeanor: Resilient, emotional, and ultimately confident and empowering.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: पहली बेटी हुई, तो बोला एक और चाहिए। [The first daughter was born, he said he wanted another.]
Character A says: दूसरी बेटी हुई, फिर बोला एक और। [The second daughter was born, he again said another.]
Character A says: पाँच साल में पाँच बेटियाँ। फिर एक दिन हार्ट अटैक से गुज़र गए। [Five daughters in five years. Then one day he passed away from a heart attack.]
Character A says: मुझे पाँच बेटियों के साथ अकेला छोड़ गए। [He left me alone with five daughters.]
Character A says: ससुराल वालों ने मुँह मोड़ लिया, मायके वालों ने भी साथ छोड़ दिया। [My in-laws turned away, my parents also abandoned me.]
Character A says: पर मैंने हार नहीं मानी। [But I didn't give up on myself.]
Character A says: मेरा नाम ज़ारा है। [My name is Zara.]
Character A says: अठारह की उम्र में शादी, तेईस में विधवा। [Married at eighteen, widow at twenty-three.]
Character A says: पाँच बेटियाँ। ना कोई पढ़ाई, ना कोई skill। [Five daughters. No education, no skills.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the protagonist's tragic backstory and immense responsibilities.
- Builds deep empathy and sets up the stakes (providing for 5 daughters alone).
- Hooks the viewer with a raw, emotional narrative of resilience.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: पहली बेटी हुई, तो बोला एक और चाहिए। (The first daughter was born, he said he wanted another.) दूसरी बेटी हुई, फिर बोला एक और। (The second daughter was born, he again said another.) पाँच साल में पाँच बेटियाँ। फिर एक दिन हार्ट अटैक से गुज़र गए। (Five daughters in five years. Then one day he passed away from a heart attack.) मुझे पाँच बेटियों के साथ अकेला छोड़ गए। (He left me alone with five daughters.) ससुराल वालों ने मुँह मोड़ लिया, मायके वालों ने भी साथ छोड़ दिया। (My in-laws turned away, my parents also abandoned me.) पर मैंने हार नहीं मानी। (But I didn't give up on myself.) मेरा नाम ज़ारा है। (My name is Zara.) अठारह की उम्र में शादी, तेईस में widow। (Married at eighteen, widow at twenty-three.) पाँच बेटियाँ। ना कोई पढ़ाई, ना कोई skill। (Five daughters. No education, no skills.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English का 'E' भी नहीं आता था। [I didn't even know the 'E' of English.]
Character A says: बैंक में दो लाख थे, महीने का खर्च अठारह हज़ार था। [There was two lakhs in the bank, monthly expenses were eighteen thousand.]
Character A says: ग्यारह महीने बाद कुछ नहीं बचा। [After eleven months, nothing was left.]
Character A says: ससुराल वालों ने कहा, हमसे नहीं होगा। [In-laws said, we can't do it.]
Character A says: मायके गई, तो अब्बू ने हाथ जोड़ कर कहा, यहाँ जगह नहीं है। [I went to my parents' house, father folded his hands and said, there is no space here.]
Character A says: मैं अंदर से टूट रही थी। [I was breaking down inside.]
Character A says: पर एक ही कमरे में मेरी पाँच बेटियाँ सो रही थीं। [But in one room my five daughters were sleeping.]
Character A says: उनके लिए मैं टूट नहीं सकती थी। [I couldn't break down for them.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the severe financial pressure and lack of support system.
- Introduces the core barrier: lack of English knowledge.
- Reinforces her motivation (her daughters) to keep fighting despite hitting rock bottom.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: English का E भी नहीं आता था। (I didn't even know the 'E' of English.) Bank में दो लाख थे, महीने का खर्च अठारह हज़ार था। (There was two lakhs in the bank, monthly expenses were eighteen thousand.) ग्यारह महीने बाद कुछ नहीं बचा। (After eleven months, nothing was left.) ससुराल वालों ने कहा, हमसे नहीं होगा। (In-laws said, we can't do it.) मायके गई, तो अब्बू ने हाथ जोड़ कर कहा, यहाँ जगह नहीं है। (I went to my parents' house, father folded his hands and said, there is no space here.) मैं अंदर से टूट रही थी। (I was breaking down inside.) पर एक ही कमरे में मेरी पाँच बेटियाँ सो रही थीं। (But in one room my five daughters were sleeping.) उनके लिए मैं टूट नहीं सकती थी। (I couldn't break down for them.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: नौकरी ढूँढी। Call center में opening थी। [I looked for a job. There was an opening in a call center.]
Character A says: Interview देने गई, Manager ने English में बात की, मैं चुप। [I went for an interview, the manager spoke in English, I was silent.]
Character A says: मुँह से एक word भी नहीं निकला। [Not a single word came out of my mouth.]
Character A says: Manager ने कहा, "We need someone who can speak basic English." [The manager said, "We need someone who can speak basic English."]
Character A says: मैं वापस आ गई। [I came back.]
Character A says: School गई admission के लिए। Form English में था। [I went to school for admission. The form was in English.]
Character A says: Teacher भी English में बात कर रही थी। [The teacher was also speaking in English.]
Character A says: मैंने कहा, हिंदी में समझा दीजिए। [I said, please explain in Hindi.]
Character A says: उन्होंने मुझे अजीब नज़रों से देखा। [They looked at me strangely.]
Character A says: उस दिन मेरी बेटी ने सब देखा, पर कुछ नहीं कहा। [That day my daughter saw everything, but didn't say anything.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates real-world consequences of not knowing English (job rejection, social humiliation).
- Connects the lack of English directly to her inability to provide for and educate her children.
- Creates a strong emotional pain point that the target audience relates to.

Interview देने गई, Manager ने English में बात की, मैं चुप। (I went for an interview, the manager spoke in English, I was silent.) मुँह से एक word भी नहीं निकला। (Not a single word came out of my mouth.) Manager ने कहा, "We need someone who can speak basic English." (The manager said, "We need someone who can speak basic English.") मैं वापस आ गई। (I came back.) scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: फिर मैंने Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड किया। [Then I downloaded the Supernova app.]
Character A says: इसमें रोज़मर्रा की English बहुत आसानी से सिखाते हैं। [They teach everyday English very easily here.]
Character A says: Basic से start किया - Hello, Thank you, Excuse me. [Started from basic - Hello, Thank you, Excuse me.]
Character A says: फिर real-life sentences - I need to check my bank balance. [Then real-life sentences - I need to check my bank balance.]
Character A says: My daughter needs admission in class one. Can you explain this form to me? [My daughter needs admission in class one. Can you explain this form to me?]
Character A says: जो English मेरी ज़िंदगी में काम आए, मैंने वो सीखी। [I learned the English that is useful in my life.]
Character A says: रात को बच्चों को सुलाने के बाद, मैं AI tutor के साथ practice करती थी। [At night after putting the kids to sleep, I used to practice with the AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces Supernova as the accessible, practical solution to her problem.
- Highlights key features: basic to real-life sentences and AI tutor practice.
- Shows that learning can fit into a busy, demanding life (practicing at night).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: फिर मैंने Supernova app download किया। (Then I downloaded the Supernova app.) इसमें रोज़मर्रा की English बहुत आसानी से सिखाते हैं। (They teach everyday English very easily here.) Basic से start किया - Hello, Thank you, Excuse me. (Started from basic - Hello, Thank you, Excuse me.) फिर real-life sentences - I need to check my bank balance. (Then real-life sentences - I need to check my bank balance.) My daughter needs admission in class one. Can you explain this form to me? (My daughter needs admission in class one. Can you explain this form to me?) जो English मेरी ज़िंदगी में काम आए, मैंने वो सीखी। (I learned the English that is useful in my life.) रात को बच्चों को सुलाने के बाद, मैं AI tutor के साथ practice करती थी। (At night after putting the kids to sleep, I used to practice with the AI tutor.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: कमरा एकदम शांत होता, और मैं फ़ोन पर English बोलती थी। [The room would be completely quiet, and I used to speak English on the phone.]
Character A says: Good morning sir, I am calling about the job opening. [Good morning sir, I am calling about the job opening.]
Character A says: My name is Zara. I have experience in household management. [My name is Zara. I have experience in household management.]
Character A says: बार-बार practice करने से confidence आ गया। [By practicing again and again, confidence came.]
Character A says: दो महीने बाद मैं उसी call center में फिर गई। [After two months, I went to that call center again.]
Character A says: मैंने कहा, Good morning sir, I had applied earlier. [I said, Good morning sir, I had applied earlier.]
Character A says: I have been working on my English. I would like another chance. [I have been working on my English. I would like another chance.]
Character A says: Manager ने कहा, Your English has improved. Welcome. [The manager said, Your English has improved. Welcome.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the direct result of using the app: gaining the confidence to speak.
- Provides a satisfying payoff to the earlier job rejection scene.
- Demonstrates spoken English in a professional context.

Good morning sir, I am calling about the job opening. (Good morning sir, I am calling about the job opening.) My name is Zara. I have experience in household management. (My name is Zara. I have experience in household management.) बार-बार practice करने से confidence आ गया। (By practicing again and again, confidence came.) दो महीने बाद मैं उसी call centre में फिर गई। (After two months, I went to that call center again.) मैंने कहा, Good morning sir, I had applied earlier. (I said, Good morning sir, I had applied earlier.) I have been working on my English. I would like another chance. (I have been working on my English. I would like another chance.) Manager ने कहा, Your English has improved. Welcome. (The manager said, Your English has improved. Welcome.)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मुझे वो नौकरी मिल गई। [I got that job.]
Character A says: Supernova से सीखी English ने मुझे सिर्फ़ job ही नहीं, promotion भी दिलाया। [The English I learned from Supernova didn't just get me a job, but a promotion too.]
Character A says: आज मैं अपने पैरों पर खड़ी हूँ, और अच्छी income है। [Today I am standing on my own feet, and have a good income.]
Character A says: English ने मुझे नौकरी दी, नौकरी ने पैसे। [English gave me a job, the job gave me money.]
Character A says: और पैसों ने मुझे सम्मान दिया। [And money gave me respect.]
Character A says: मेरी पाँचों बेटियाँ school जाती हैं। [All my five daughters go to school.]
Character A says: Teacher English में बात करती है, और मैं English में जवाब देती हूँ। [The teacher speaks in English, and I answer in English.]
Character A says: मेरी बेटियाँ मुझे देखकर मुस्कुराती हैं। [My daughters look at me and smile.]
Character A says: पिछले साल अब्बू आए थे, बोले कि उनसे गलती हो गई। [Last year father came, said he made a mistake.]
Character A says: मैंने कहा, अब मुझे किसी सहारे की ज़रूरत नहीं है। [I said, now I don't need anyone's support.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the ultimate emotional and financial payoff (respect, independence, pride of her daughters).
- Removes competitor-specific side hustles (Meesho) to focus purely on the English-to-success pipeline.
- Provides closure to the family rejection subplot.

Supernova से सीखी English ने मुझे सिर्फ़ job ही नहीं, promotion भी दिलाया। (The English I learned from Supernova didn't just get me a job, but a promotion too.) आज मैं अपने पैरों पर खड़ी हूँ, और अच्छी income है। (Today I am standing on my own feet, and have a good income.) scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: मैं अपनी बेटियों के लिए खुद ही काफ़ी हूँ। [I am enough for my daughters myself.]
Character A says: अगर माँ हो, तो शेरनी बनो। [If you are a mother, then be a lioness.]
Character A says: और शेरनी को English आनी ही चाहिए। [And a lioness must know English.]
Character A says: आज ही Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Download the Supernova app today.]
Character A says: AI tutor के साथ बेझिझक बोलना सीखो। [Learn to speak without hesitation with the AI tutor.]
Character A says: रोज़ सिर्फ़ पंद्रह मिनट practice करो। [Practice for just fifteen minutes daily.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Empowers the viewer with a strong, memorable metaphor (lioness).
- Transitions from story to direct Call to Action.
- Reiterates the low barrier to entry (15 mins a day, AI tutor).
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: मैं अपनी बेटियों के लिए खुद ही काफ़ी हूँ। (I am enough for my daughters myself.) अगर माँ हो, तो शेरनी बनो। (If you are a mother, then be a lioness.) और शेरनी को English आनी ही चाहिए। (And a lioness must know English.) आज ही Supernova app download करो। (Download the Supernova app today.) AI tutor के साथ बेझिझक बोलना सीखो। (Learn to speak without hesitation with the AI tutor.) रोज़ सिर्फ़ पंद्रह मिनट practice करो। (Practice for just fifteen minutes daily.)

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अब और इंतज़ार मत करो। Install Now पर क्लिक करो और Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Don't wait anymore. Click on Install Now and download the Supernova app.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Final, clear directive to install the app.
- Leaves the brand name as the last impression.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: अभी INSTALL NOW पर क्लिक करो और Supernova app download करो। (Click on INSTALL NOW right now and download the Supernova app.)

brand_swaps_detected.supernova_swap: Removed entirely to focus on career promotion via English
Replaced with vague 'good income' to avoid scammy hype
